'''Eyl Dix''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] communications expert aboard the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''. She belonged to a sharp-eared, dark green-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that possessed two pair of antennae.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
